name: HKC (Holdings) Limited
summary: HKC (Holdings) Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the property development and investment, and renewable energy investment and operation businesses in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Properties Development, Property Investment and Leasing, Renewable Energy, and Other Operations segments. The company develops and builds residential properties, including townhouses, high-rise apartments, and commercial shops; and invests in shopping malls and offices, as well as properties for restaurants and retails. It also holds properties; develops and operates building materials center; owns and operates wind power and distributed solar projects; and provides property management services. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. HKC (Holdings) Limited is a subsidiary of Claudio Holdings Limited.
